message:
feat(fwc): add transcript/replay artifact contract and cross-cutting invariant tests

Implements two verification beads for the truthfulness migration:

- 29.8.5: TranscriptPhase (6 variants), TranscriptEntry, ReplayArtifact,
  EvidenceBundleMetadata with redaction-safe evidence bundle generation
- 29.8.4: 25 cross-cutting invariant tests verifying truthfulness semantics
  across all contract sections (source consistency, mode behavior, simulate
  labeling, auth rejection, workflow gating, intent classification)

45 new tests (605 total catalog tests), all passing.

Beads: 1g7z0.29.8.5, 1g7z0.29.8.4

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
